novel_features.name: Agent Action Replay
novel_features.description: Generate a self-contained static HTML timeline of every screenshot, click, bash, and exec your agent ran on a computer.

novel_features.name: Audit Trail
novel_features.description: Chronological table of every CLI-driven action against your computers in a time window, scoped by workspace, FTS-searchable.

novel_features.name: Action Grep
novel_features.description: FTS5 search over historical bash commands, Python exec code, and click coordinates from the local actions store.

novel_features.name: Fleet Doctor
novel_features.description: Cross-workspace health rollup: surfaces suspended (over-quota), errored, stuck-creating, and stuck-stopping computers, plus an API-key validity probe.

novel_features.name: Idle Computers
novel_features.description: Sorts running computers by hours-since-last-CLI-action, surfacing burns that could be stopped.

novel_features.name: Oversized Computers
novel_features.description: Flags computers with CPU >= 4 cores or RAM >= 16 GB whose last CLI-recorded action is older than the threshold and whose auto-stop is disabled.

novel_features.name: Bulk Prune
novel_features.description: Cross-workspace status-filtered batch delete with dry-run by default.

novel_features.name: Cost Breakdown
novel_features.description: Reconstructs per-computer running-hours from local action timestamps + observed status transitions, multiplies by per-tier rate, sums by workspace. --forecast projects month-end burn.

novel_features.name: DOM-Aware Browser Automation
novel_features.description: 16-subcommand group driving Chrome inside an Orgo VM at the DOM level via an auto-deployed in-VM Node bridge (port 7331). Surface: navigate, tabs, new-tab, switch-tab, read-page (a11y tree with refs), find, page-text, screenshot, click (--ref or --x/--y), type, form-input, scroll, evaluate, console, network, resize. Cobra-tree walker auto-registers each as an MCP tool (chrome_*). Inherits VM-direct routing transparently.
